LanguageData.Head: 머리
LanguageData.CannotPreviewFactionNotPresent: 미리보기 불가: 현재 게임에 진영이 없습니다.
LanguageData.AppliedToAllKinds: 현재 장비를 이 진영의 모든 폰종에 적용했습니다!
LanguageData.ApplyToAllKindsConfirm: 이 진영의 모든 폰종을 현재 장비 설정으로 덮어쓰시겠습니까?
LanguageData.NewPresetCreated: 새 프리셋이 생성되고 현재 설정으로 저장되었습니다!
LanguageData.ApplyToOthersTooltip: 현재 장비를 이 진영의 다른 모든 폰종에 적용
LanguageData.ForceNakedTooltip: 활성화 시 모든 의류를 제거하고 장비를 적용합니다. (연령 확인 필요)
LanguageData.ForceOnlySelectedTooltip: 기존 장비를 제거하고 지정한 장비만 착용합니다. 완전한 제어를 위해 권장합니다.
LanguageData.ForceOverrideHediffsTooltip: 비기계 상태 효과를 제거하고 설정된 효과만 적용합니다. 유전자 효과도 포함됩니다.
LanguageData.WeightMechanicsTooltip: 장비 가중치는 선택 확률로 작용하며, 높을수록 우선됩니다.
LanguageData.NoPresetDescription: You need to create or load a preset to start configuring faction gear. Presets save your configurations.
LanguageData.PresetEqualsConfigTip: 프리셋 = 설정. 편집을 시작하려면 프리셋을 만드세요.
LanguageData.ClearAllConfigsTooltip: 저장된 모든 설정 데이터를 삭제하고 초기 상태로 되돌립니다.
LanguageData.ClearAllConfigsConfirmMessage: This will delete all saved faction gear configurations and cannot be undone.
LanguageData.SaveImmediateEffectTooltip: 모든 변경사항이 즉시 적용되며 재시작이 필요 없습니다.
LanguageData.EnableDebugLogTooltip: 문제 해결을 위해 상세 로그를 출력합니다. 필요시에만 켜세요.
LanguageData.ForceIgnoreTooltip: 충돌 장비/무기를 강제 제거하고 예산을 무시합니다.
LanguageData.AmmoProtectionTooltip: 모드 생성 탄약만 유지하고 중복을 방지합니다.
LanguageData.ForceIgnoreGlobalTooltip: 전역: 예산 무시, 충돌 장비 제거. 로컬 설정으로 덮어쓸 수 있습니다.
LanguageData.ForceIgnoreLocalTooltip: 로컬: 이 폰종에만 예산 무시, 충돌 장비 제거. 전역보다 우선합니다.
LanguageData.Name: 이름
LanguageData.SelectPresetFirst: Please select a preset from the left list first.
LanguageData.LoadPresetConfirmTitle: Overwrite preset "{0}" with current game settings?
LanguageData.LoadPresetConfirmMessage: Overwrite this preset's gear data with current in-game configuration?
LanguageData.UpdateFromGameTooltip: 현재 게임 설정으로 이 프리셋을 덮어씁니다.
LanguageData.ModNotActiveTooltip: 이 모드는 현재 게임에서 활성화되지 않았습니다.
LanguageData.SelectHediffToViewDetails: Select a hediff to view details.
LanguageData.Label: Label
LanguageData.LoadPresetConfirmMessage:
Clear current custom gear before applying preset?
Yes: Overwrite all (Recommended) No: Merge with current
LanguageData.ClearPresetTooltip: 프리셋 데이터를 지우고 프리셋 자체는 유지합니다.
LanguageData.CreatePresetTooltip: 새 프리셋을 만들고 현재 설정을 저장합니다.
LanguageData.CannotAddItemsInCurrentTabTooltip: 현재 탭에서는 아이템을 추가할 수 없습니다.
LanguageData.FactionEditTooltip: 진영 편집, 그룹 편집, 정착지 추가.
LanguageData.FactionEditDisabledInLiteMode: Faction editing is not available in world creation. Please access the full editor through Mod Settings after entering the game.
LanguageData.NewFactionDisabledInLiteMode: Adding factions is not available in world creation. Please access the full editor through Mod Settings after entering the game.
LanguageData.FiltersDisabledInLiteMode: Item filters are not available in world creation. Please access the full editor through Mod Settings after entering the game.
LanguageData.AdvancedModeTooltip: 고급: 정밀 편집. 간단 모드는 기본 장비 풀만.
LanguageData.ClearAllGearTooltip: 현재 폰종의 모든 장비 설정을 지웁니다.
LanguageData.KindXenotypeTooltip: 이종 생성, 나이 제한 등 편집.
LanguageData.BatchApplyTooltip: 현재 설정을 선택한 폰종에 일괄 적용.
LanguageData.BatchApplyNoCategorySelected: Please select at least one category to copy.
LanguageData.NewFactionTooltip: 새 진영 생성. 게임 내에서만 가능.
LanguageData.CreateFactionTooltip: 기존 진영을 복제하여 새 진영 생성.
LanguageData.FactionDefNameRequired: DefName is required and must be unique.
LanguageData.FactionDefNameExists: Faction with this DefName already exists.
LanguageData.PointsOverrideTooltip: 이 폰의 레이드 포인트를 재정의합니다. 빈 칸은 기본값.
LanguageData.AutoCalculateRaidPointsDone: 장비 가치로 레이드 포인트 자동 계산됨.
LanguageData.AutoRaidPointsEnabledTooltip: 장비 가치로 레이드 포인트 계산, 엘리트 압축 레이드.
LanguageData.SelectFactionToCreate: Select faction template to create new instance.
LanguageData.ConfirmCreateNewInstance: Create new faction instance? Note: Too many instances may affect performance. Recommended max 10 per type.
LanguageData.TooManyInstances: Too many instances of this type (>20). Cannot create more.
LanguageData.SettlementPermanentWarning: Warning: New settlements cannot be deleted! Only available while this window is open.
LanguageData.EnterSpawningModeMessage: Spawning mode active. Right-click world map to spawn {0} settlement.
LanguageData.NoFactionInstancesFound: No instances found. Create one first.
LanguageData.PawnGroupGuideContent:
[Group Types]
• Combat: Battle groups for raids • Trader: Trade groups, must include traders • Settlement: Settlement garrisons • Peaceful: Peaceful visitors
[Weights]
Commonality determines selection probability.
[Points]
Limits maximum combat power. Usually set very high for storyteller control.
[Role Configuration]
• Options: General combatants • Traders: Merchant core (Trader groups only) • Carriers: Pack animals/porters • Guards: Escorts protecting merchants
Warnings: • Deleting all Combat groups prevents raids • Trader groups without Traders fail to generate
LanguageData.ConfirmCreateSettlement:
Faction established. Create settlement now?
(Settlements required for faction to appear in-game)
LanguageData.NoImageLoaded: No image loaded. Enter valid absolute path.
LanguageData.PreviewFailed_FactionNotFound: Cannot preview: Faction not found in current game.
LanguageData.NameCannotBeOnlySpecialChars: Name cannot contain only special characters
LanguageData.Changelog_FixWikiLang: Fixed Wiki language setting not applying
LanguageData.Changelog_AddWikiUI: Wiki UI improvements: added title bar, section coloring, layout optimization
LanguageData.FactionDeleteFailed: Failed to delete faction. Check logs.
LanguageData.FGC_FirstTimePrompt_Description:
Detected saved faction gear presets. Which preset would you like to use for this save?
You can change this later in Mod Settings.
LanguageData.FGC_Message_SelectedFactionsApplied: Applied {1} factions from preset "{0}" to current save.
LanguageData.FGC_Message_UsingVanilla: Current save uses vanilla faction settings.
LanguageData.NoPresetCannotSave: Create or load preset to save
LanguageData.Wiki_Principles_Content:
[How does this mod work?]
Simply put: After you configure the mod, when the game generates new characters (enemies, caravans, defenders, etc.), the mod quietly replaces their original gear with your custom gear.
[When does it take effect?] • New enemy raids • New caravans arriving • Settlement defenders refreshing • Reinforcements, visitors, etc.
⚠️ Note: Characters already on the map will NOT change!
[Simple Mode vs Advanced Mode]
📍 Simple Mode: Adjust equipment probabilities using sliders, as easy as adjusting volume. Good for: Quickly adjusting faction gear style without worrying about details.
📍 Advanced Mode: Directly specify what characters must wear and use. Good for: Precise control, like "All soldiers must wear power armor".
[What is Budget?]
Each pawn kind has a "budget". Equipment exceeding the budget won't be generated.
Example: A tribal warrior with 500 silver budget won't get an 800 silver weapon.
Want full customization? Increase the budget, or enable the "Force Ignore" option.
[Be careful with Force Options!] • Force Ignore: Ignores budget, may create overpowered characters, breaking game balance • Force Only Selected: Remove all vanilla gear, must ensure you have complete equipment configured
[Adjust Item Generation Probability] • Weight: Equipment probability, click specific item to see slider, adjust to desired probability.
[What are Item Pools?]
Put multiple items into a pool, randomly draw one when generating. Benefit: Different enemy equipment each time, more challenging.
There are 4 pools you can configure separately, draw probability determined by weights.
LanguageData.Wiki_Terminology_Content:
[Core Concepts You Must Know]
🎭 PawnKind The "classes" in the game: Pirate Gunner, Tribal Warrior, Empire Knight, etc. Each pawn kind has its own equipment preferences and stats.
🏴 Faction A force composed of multiple pawn kinds: Pirates, Tribals, Empire, Caravans, etc. A faction has many pawn kinds.
🔧 Group Every faction generates units with a "group", such as "Combat", "Trader", "Settlement", etc. A faction has many groups. You can add different pawn kinds or mechanoids to groups.
💰 Budget How much silver each pawn kind can spend on equipment. Exceed the budget? Won't be generated.
🎲 Selection Mode • AlwaysTake: Always equipped • RandomChance: Based on luck • FromPool: Randomly draw one
🛡️ Force Options • Force Ignore: Ignore budget, force equip • Force Naked: Strip first, then equip your selections • Force Only Selected: Remove all vanilla gear
🔧 Item Properties • Material: Steel, cloth, plasteel, etc. Affects stats • Quality: Awful → Legendary, affects stats and price
💊 Hediff (Health State) Can force add states to characters: bionic limbs, drugs, diseases, etc. Use: All archotech cyborgs!
🏘️ Group Types (Select pawn types to spawn here) • Combat: Enemies that attack you / Allies that support you • Trader: Caravans for trading • Settlement: Settlement defenders • Peaceful: Peaceful visitors
⚙️ Tech Level Primitive → Medieval → Industrial → Spacer → Ultra High-tech equipment won't work for low-tech factions
🦠 Xenotype Only available with Biotech DLC: Sanguophages, pigmen, mole people, and other genetically modified humans. Can set probabilities for different xenotypes in each faction.
LanguageData.Wiki_Workflow_Content:
[Quick Start - Workflow]
1. Want to quickly adjust faction gear? Follow these steps! • Create Preset Click "Preset Manager" → New → Name it (e.g., "Enhanced Tribals") • Select Faction and Pawn Kind Left side: Select faction (Pirates/Tribals/Empire...) Middle: Select pawn kind (Gunner/Warrior/Knight...) • Configure Gear Simple Mode: Drag sliders to adjust equipment probabilities Advanced Mode: Click "Add" to select specific equipment • Save and Apply Click Save! Then wait for new enemies to arrive, see the effect!
Tip: Try Simple Mode first, Advanced Mode gives precise control over each item.
2. Want to adjust faction group generated pawn kinds? (Add Animals/Mechanoids/Non-Faction Members) • Click Edit Faction Click "Edit Faction" → Dropdown find the group to adjust (e.g., "Combat #1") • Select Pawn Kinds Middle: Select pawn kinds to remove/add (Warriors/Animals/Mechanoids...) • Edit Group Adjust the group's pawn kinds/count/weights, etc. • Save and Apply Click Save! Then wait for new enemies to arrive, see the group effect!
[Advanced Play]
1. Random but Themed (Item Pools) Different enemy equipment each time? • Advanced Mode → Click "Item Pool" • Pool1 put in multiple weapons • Set weights (higher = more likely to be selected) • Randomly draws one when generating
2. All Cyborgs Want enemies to be all mechanically enhanced? • Advanced Mode → "Add Forced Hediff" • Select "Bionic Leg", "Bionic Arm", etc. • Set 100% probability
3. Batch Apply Want one configuration for all pawn kinds in a faction? • Configure one pawn kind • Right-click → Copy • Select other pawn kinds → Right-click → Paste • Done!
4. Live Preview Not sure about the effect? Click "Preview" button, see generation results directly! Adjust until satisfied.
5. Export Preset to Share Configured something good to share with friends? • Preset Manager → Export • Copy the generated string • Send to friends • Friends can import and use
[Practice]
Task: Add Powerful Mechanoid Boss to Faction Configuration: • Top Left - Faction Edit • Dropdown find Faction Group Edit • Select specific group type, such as (Combat #1) • Add Mechanoids.
Task: Strengthen Tribal Forces Goal: Make tribal enemies wear better equipment Configuration: • Increase budget (tribals are originally poor) • Simple Mode: Increase ranged and melee weights • Or Advanced Mode: Directly add iron swords, leather armor
Task: Create Elite Enemies Goal: A faction with all legendary equipment Configuration: • Advanced Mode: Set each item to "Legendary" quality • Enable "Force Ignore" • Enable "Force Only Selected" • Add strongest equipment
LanguageData.Wiki_Notes_Content:
[Must Know!]
⏰ Save! Save! • Save takes effect immediately, no game restart needed • Only affects newly spawned enemies/caravans/defenders • Enemies already on the map won't change!
Want to know the effect? Click "Preview" button, see directly!
[Common Issues]
If gear modifications don't take effect, please check:
- Whether it conforms to [Budget] limits - Whether successfully saved to [Preset] - Whether [Force Ignore] is enabled - Whether [Force Only Selected] is enabled
If pawn collapses after spawning, please check:
- Whether carried items exceed reasonable [Mass/Bulk] - Whether severe [Debuff] was added in the Hediff menu
🔧 Can't select items? • Requires specific DLC • Is it disabled by other mods • Tech level too high
🔧 Compatibility with xxx mod? • Place that incompatible mod after this mod in load order.
[Force Options Warning]
⚠️ Force Ignore: May create "god-tier" enemies, game becomes too easy ⚠️ Force Naked: Remember to configure enough clothes, otherwise truly naked ⚠️ Force Only Selected: Make sure your custom list has items first!
[Backup!]
• First use export a vanilla preset • Major modifications export a backup • Test before sharing with friends
[Compatibility]
✅ These mods tested for compatibility: • Combat Extended (CE) • Vanilla Expanded series • Ideology DLC • Biotech DLC
⚠️ Mod load order: Harmony → Large Mods → This Mod → Small Patches
[Questions?] Contact me:
• Steam Workshop https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3670833973
• GitHub https://github.com/yancy22737-sudo/FactionGearCustomizer
• QQ Group 984338429
LanguageData.ItemQualityTooltip: 이 폰종의 모든 아이템 품질 재정의.
LanguageData.OutfitFirstBudgetStrategyTooltip: 예산 내에서 완전한 코어 의상을 우선 생성합니다.
LanguageData.ConfirmSaveBeforePreview: You have unsaved changes. Save before preview?
LanguageData.ClearStatusesTooltip: 이 폰종의 모든 상태 효과 제거
LanguageData.ConfirmClearStatuses: Are you sure you want to clear all status effects?
LanguageData.ConfirmClearInventory: Are you sure you want to clear all items?
LanguageData.ApplyHediffsToOthersTooltip: 현재 상태 효과를 다른 폰종에 적용
LanguageData.NoOtherKindsInFaction: No other kinds in this faction.
LanguageData.MassCriticalWarning: Critical overweight: {0}/{1} kg - May cause inability to move!
LanguageData.BulkCriticalWarning: Critical overbulk: {0}/{1} - May cause inability to move!
LanguageData.InventoryOverweightWarning: Warning: Inventory critically overweight, pawn may be unable to move!
LanguageData.HediffWarning_ConsciousnessZero: Will cause pawn to lose consciousness and be unable to act
LanguageData.HediffWarning_MovingZero: Will cause pawn to be unable to move
LanguageData.HediffWarning_MovingLow: Will severely reduce pawn moving capability
LanguageData.HediffWarning_ManipulationZero: Will cause pawn to be unable to manipulate items
LanguageData.HediffWarning_ManipulationLow: Will severely reduce pawn manipulation capability
LanguageData.yFE_ExportNoSelection: Please select factions to export first
LanguageData.P2_SelectFactionHint: Click a faction to view details
LanguageData.P2_NoWorldComponent: Error: Cannot find world faction component
LanguageData.P2_AppliedToWorld: Successfully applied {0} factions to world ({1} mode)
LanguageData.P2_NoNewFactionsToAdd: No new factions to add (all selected factions already exist)
LanguageData.P2_NotInGameWarning: [Note] Not currently in game, some features (e.g., apply to save) are unavailable
LanguageData.Validation_InvalidChance: Chance out of range, clamped to 0-1
LanguageData.Validation_LethalHediff: Hediff '{0}' has lethal severity {1:F1}, use with caution!
LanguageData.Validation_NegativeMaxPartsRange: Negative min in maxPartsRange, set to 0
LanguageData.Validation_InvalidMaxPartsRange: Invalid maxPartsRange, swapped min and max
LanguageData.Validation_ExcessiveSeverityMax: Severity max too large (>1), clamped to 1
LanguageData.Validation_InvalidSeverityRange: Invalid severity range, swapped min and max
LanguageData.Validation_PawnHealthNull: Pawn health or hediffSet is null
LanguageData.Validation_PawnBodyNull: Pawn raceProps or body is null
LanguageData.Validation_NoAvailableParts: No available body parts for hediff '{0}'
LanguageData.Validation_InsufficientParts: Insufficient available parts for hediff '{0}': requested {1}, available {2}
LanguageData.Validation_TooManyImplantsForPart: Too many implants for part '{0}': {1} requested, max allowed {2}
LanguageData.BatchHistoryClearConfirm: Clear all batch apply history? This cannot be undone.
LanguageData.BatchHistoryInvalid: Cannot revert: target data is corrupted.
LanguageData.BatchHistoryRevertConfirm: Revert this batch apply operation? Target kinds will be restored to their previous state.
LanguageData.AgeSettingsTooltip: 이 폰종의 생물학적 나이 범위 설정.
LanguageData.AgeSettingsHint: Leave empty to disable. If in conflict with faction group settings, this will take precedence. Age will be clamped to the minimum adult age of the race.
LanguageData.AgeClampedToAdult: Age value adjusted to minimum adult age: {0}
LanguageData.NonCombatantWarningText:
Warning: The selected pawn kind contains "non-combatant" genes or cannot be generated as a combatant.
If you force apply this pawn kind, we will automatically relax generation rules to allow generating non-combatant Pawns. This may result in the pawn kind being useless in combat (e.g., only running away).
Continue?
LanguageData.TradeStockReplaceVanillaTip: 미체크: 사용자 정의 추가. 체크: 바닐라 제거 후 사용자 정의만.
LanguageData.TradeStockReplaceConfirm: When enabled, all vanilla stock will be cleared and only your configured items will appear in trade. Continue?
LanguageData.TradeStockResetConfirm: Reset to vanilla defaults? This will discard all custom changes.
